subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the one true God, the Dawning-Place of bounty, Who hath graciously vouchsafed unity amongst His loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد خداوند یکتا و مشرق عطا را لایق و سزا که مابین دوستان خود الفت عنایت فرمود
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @contention and conflict, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
